title: NATIONAL VOLUNTARY ORGANIZATIONS ACTIVE IN DISASTER - 211info
text: OREGON VOLUNTARY ORGANIZATIONS ACTIVE IN DISASTER NATIONAL VOLUNTARY ORGANIZATIONS ACTIVE IN DISASTER Print & Share X Print & Share Print PDF Provides disaster relief coordination between a diverse group of organizations serving communities throughout the disaster cycle. Volunteer opportunities are available. Does not provide direct assistance; households seeking assistance must contact local organizations. Eligibility: Unrestricted Hours: Not applicable Email Visit Website Email Address: [email protected] INTAKE PROCEDURE: Visit website FEES: None DOCUMENTS: None required at intake AREA SERVED: State of Oregon Services: Disaster Related Volunteer Preparedness/Mobilization Programs Volunteer Opportunities * Disaster/Emergency Issues If you represent this agency, update your listing here . * The community resource directory information is up to date to the best of our knowledge. However, you should always call the provider to confirm this information and make an appointment. Be sure to confirm payment information with the provider, if payment is required. 211Info does not rate, recommend or endorse any agency. We simply provide information as a public service. No Mapping Information Available
